lessons_learned.issue: Git init at root instead of project folder
lessons_learned.solution: CD into the correct folder first, then git init.
Don't batch too many delete_file commands in one message.
Read the terminal output (STDOUT) carefully, don't hallucinate based on prompt context.

lessons_learned.issue: Pesan push mengandung file yang terhapus pasca stress test
lessons_learned.solution: Selalu jalankan audit file atau restore sebelum melakukan push final ke GitHub.
